parameters.query:
=INSERT INTO public.sf_customers (phone, push_name, clinic_id)
VALUES ('{{ $('Parse Evolution Payload').first().json.phone }}', '{{ $('Parse Evolution Payload').first().json.pushName }}', '{{ $json.clinic_id }}')
ON CONFLICT (phone, clinic_id) DO UPDATE SET push_name = EXCLUDED.push_name, updated_at = NOW()

=SELECT icm.clinic_id, COALESCE((SELECT json_agg(TO_CHAR(a.scheduled_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') ORDER BY a.scheduled_at) FROM public.sf_appointments a WHERE a.clinic_id = icm.clinic_id AND a.status NOT IN ('cancelled', 'no_show') AND a.scheduled_at >= NOW() AND a.scheduled_at <= NOW() + INTERVAL '7 days'), '[]'::json) AS booked_slots FROM public.sf_instance_clinic_map icm WHERE icm.instance_name = '{{ $('Parse Evolution Payload').first().json.instanceName }}' LIMIT 1
=DELETE FROM public.sf_customers WHERE phone = '{{ $('É Comando Reset?').first().json.phone }}' AND clinic_id = '{{ $json.clinicId }}'
=DELETE FROM public.sf_appointments WHERE remote_jid = '{{ $('É Comando Reset?').first().json.remoteJid }}' AND clinic_id = '{{ $('É Comando Reset?').first().json.clinicId }}'

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  instance_id: $json.instanceName,
  clinic_id: $json.clinicId || 'unknown',
  remote_jid: $json.remoteJid,
  push_name: $json.pushName,
  message: $json.messageContent,
  message_type: $json.messageType,
  wamid: $json.wamid,
  available_slots: $json.availableSlots || [],
  conversation_type: 'first_contact'
}) }}

parameters.query: =UPDATE public.sf_active_chats SET is_paused = true, paused_reason = 'human_escalation' WHERE remote_jid = '{{ $('Parse Evolution Payload').first().json.remoteJid }}'

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'ok', processed: true, trace_id: $json.traceId, agents: $json.agentName, language: $json.language }) }}
